About Us

Building Compliance Infrastructure for Digital India

DHYANSHIV INDIA PRIVATE LIMITED is a government-recognized compliance technology company dedicated to simplifying corporate governance for startups, MSMEs, and enterprises.

Our Mission

We believe compliance shouldn't be a barrier to growth. Our mission is to transform complex regulatory requirements into streamlined, automated workflows that empower businesses to focus on what matters most — building great products and services.

Founded with the vision of enabling Digital Bharat, we combine deep domain expertise in corporate law, taxation, and technology to deliver solutions that are both legally robust and technically elegant.

From incorporation to ongoing compliance, from tax optimization to audit readiness — we're your partners in navigating India's regulatory landscape with confidence.

Verified

MCA & Startup India recognized

Secure

Bank-grade encryption & compliance

Fast

SLA-driven delivery timelines

Scale

Built for growth-stage companies

Our Values

Principles That Guide Every Decision

Integrity First

We do what's right, not what's easy. Every filing, every advisory, every interaction.

Precision Engineering

Compliance is code. We apply software rigor to legal workflows — tested, auditable, reliable.

Client Obsession

Your success metrics are our KPIs. We measure ourselves by your outcomes, not our outputs.

Continuous Evolution

Regulations change. Technology evolves. We stay ahead so you don't have to.

Ready to Begin?

Let's Build Your Compliance Roadmap

Book a free 30-minute advisory session. No sales pitch — just a clear action plan with timelines, costs, and next steps.

Schedule Free Advisory

Built with security and compliance as our foundation. Not offering financial advice.

Disclaimer: DHYANSHIV INDIA PRIVATE LIMITED is a registered company in India. All services are provided in compliance with applicable laws and regulations. We do not offer financial, legal, or investment advice. Always consult with qualified professionals for legal and financial matters. Payment processing is done through Razorpay, a licensed payment aggregator. Your data is protected under our Privacy Policy and applicable data protection laws.
